result.stdout:
U-APS Scheduler CLI

Usage:
  uaps <input> <output>    Run scheduler
  uaps update              Update CLI and native library
  uaps version             Show version
  uaps help                Show this help

Supported formats:
  - Excel: .xlsx
  - JSON:  .json

Examples:
  uaps input.xlsx output.xlsx
  uaps input.json output.json
  uaps update
